title: Multiple Email Addresses for a CRM Contact
excerpt:
Description
Currently in the CRM you can only have one emails address per person (to track emails). You can add a second email but it wont track emails from that second email. Some clients just have more than one email, …

posts.author: Mat.C (Mathew Conniff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently in the CRM you can only have one emails address per person (to track emails). You can add a second email but it wont track emails from that second email. Some clients just have more than one email, so this makes it difficult to log the emails.

What are you trying to achieve

It would be great if the CRM contacts could have multiple email addresses per person (and track email from both email addresses).

Another potential solution would be to allow subitems to track emails, therefore I could just add a subitem under the contact with their second email and it would all be logged in one contact. Currently subitems do not have email tracking.

posts.author: Nakwurst (Sandro Wu)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, I can’t believe that a single contact and a single email per item is the expected norm. You should be able to have multiple trackable contacts per item.
